checks.title: Canonical memory store exists under runtime_state/memory
Workspace progress projection is generated
Workspace progress projection contains durable objective or milestone data
Workspace progress projection exposes a durable updatedAt timestamp
Existing learning artifacts remain addressable
At least one bounded memory pack is compiled
Latest bounded memory pack reuses previously persisted canonical memory
Latest bounded memory pack excludes task-family mismatched governed memory types
Public lane projections expose canonical memory-derived lesson or improvement state
Promotion and revocation health entries expose non-empty memoryType values
Canonical observation projection is generated from runtime outcomes
Continuity projection and public summary are generated
AGI readiness live surface is generated from canonical evaluation evidence
Readiness headline breadth semantics are explicit and consistent with repo-wide coverage
Readiness promotion surface does not present self-comparison as a distinct incumbent comparison
Repo-wide coverage failures are reflected in readiness bottlenecks and blocked reasons
Learning lane projections reflect canonical runtime observations
Repo-wide breadth coverage exposes live family evidence for supported task families
Weakest gate semantics are explained with margin or tie-aware pressure rules
Primary learning lane no longer reports unexplained observation starvation
Continuity public summary exposes non-empty live handoff, verifier, release, and horizon evidence
Readiness exports a public-safe robustness breakdown from live evidence
Autonomous learning agenda projection is present and non-empty
Autonomous learning agenda has running or passed remediation items
Causal learning trace is generated from selected pack items and outcomes
Primary lane exposes causal usage when runtime observations exist
Secondary advisory lane exposes advisory trace when considered for pack selection
Distinct improvement lineage contains at least three comparisons
Distinct improvement lineage includes at least one non-promoted comparison
Continuity debt surface is generated and addressable
Operational goal completion artifact is generated
Stable coverage matrix and trend are generated
Causal regression alerts are generated

Operational goal completion remains NOT_YET when thresholds are not satisfied

Public validation entries expose stable references
Public validation entries expose non-blank task outcome status
Public artifacts avoid raw UUID-like titles
